# kDNSServiceFlagsUnique | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsUnique ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsUnique)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsUnique 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsUnique

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsUnique: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsUnique#Discussion)

Indicates that the record’s name is to be unique on the network (e.g. SRV records).
